meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Advanced Checklist for Freelance Devs
content.seo_description: Break through development plateaus. This advanced checklist shows freelancers how to use Antigravity and Claude Code to solve complex bugs and ship faster.
content.answer_block: Break through development stagnation by offloading complex logic analysis to LLM agents. By integrating Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for iterative CLI-based debugging, you transform from a manual coder into an AI-augmented orchestrator, slashing debugging time by 70% and accelerating your project delivery cycles.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a screen at 3 AM. The stack trace is a labyrinth, the client is breathing down your neck for a milestone, and your momentum has hit a brick wall. You’re stuck in the 'basic app' trap—churning out code that works but feels fragile, with bugs that defy simple logic.

It’s time to stop fighting the machine and start leading it. Real-world engineering isn't about knowing every syntax nuance; it’s about architectural leverage. By shifting to an AI-augmented debugging workflow, you stop guessing and start executing with surgical precision. This is how you reclaim your time and build production-grade software at velocity.

steps.title: Contextualize the Failure
steps.description: Before fixing, isolate the blast radius. Use AI to map out dependency chains that might be causing the silent failure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the provided stack trace and local file structure. Identify the root cause of the silent failure in the authentication middleware, focusing on race conditions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude read ./src/middleware/auth.ts ./src/utils/session.ts --prompt 'Identify potential race conditions in these files.'

steps.title: Architectural Sanity Check
steps.description: Ensure your code follows modern design patterns. AI can spot structural weaknesses that lead to technical debt.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Evaluate this module against clean architecture principles. Suggest a refactor to improve testability and reduce coupling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor the auth logic to use a strategy pattern for better scalability'

steps.title: Unit Test Synthesis
steps.description: Don't just fix the bug; prevent the regression. Generate high-coverage tests for the identified edge case.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive test suite for the fixed function, covering both happy paths and edge cases like expired tokens.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create vitest unit tests for the updated auth controller'

steps.title: Performance Profiling
steps.description: Use AI to identify O(n) bottlenecks that you missed during the initial implementation phase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify performance bottlenecks in the data transformation layer. Suggest optimizations for large datasets.
steps.claude_code_command: claude read ./src/services/dataProcessor.ts --prompt 'find O(n^2) operations and suggest O(n) alternatives'

steps.title: Final CI/CD Integration
steps.description: Automate the verification of your fix within your existing deployment pipeline.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a GitHub Action snippet to run the newly created unit tests before every merge to main.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate a github actions yaml file for continuous integration of my test suite'

pro_tips: Always provide the AI with your 'package.json' or dependency tree first; it helps the model understand the constraints of your environment.
Use Claude Code's 'read' command iteratively to build a massive context window before asking for a multi-file refactor.
When debugging, ask the AI to explain the 'why' behind the bug, not just the fix; this turns every bug into a learning opportunity.
If the AI suggests a refactor, demand a 'migration plan' so you can implement changes incrementally without breaking production.
Maintain a 'system prompt' for your projects that defines your preferred coding style, which you can inject into Antigravity sessions.
content.next_steps: Integrate these tools into your daily workflow for one week, then document your time-saved metrics to show clients your increased efficiency.
content.conversion_block: Stop building basic apps and start engineering professional-grade SaaS solutions that scale. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
